_meta.description: Reasoning scaffolds for banking analysis tasks.

scaffolds.name: Statement Balance Reconciliation
steps: Capture opening and closing balances with dates
Sum debits, credits, and adjustments for the period
Check whether computed ending balance matches reported closing balance
Identify missing or pending transactions affecting tie-out
Return discrepancy details with cited evidence

scaffolds.name: Transaction Lookup
steps: Normalize query entities (merchant, amount, date, channel)
Search transaction table using exact and fuzzy anchors
Resolve duplicate or near-match rows
Return matched row(s) with confidence and references
List follow-up checks if multiple candidates remain

scaffolds.name: Card Statement Charge Analysis
steps: Separate purchases, fees, interest, and credits
Identify minimum payment, due date, and grace indicators
Highlight unusual recurring or high-risk charges
Check for refunds or charge reversals
Provide neutral next-step guidance for disputes

scaffolds.name: Loan Installment Split
steps: Extract installment amount and due date
Split installment into principal, interest, and fees
Track resulting principal balance trend
Check for late fees or capitalization events
Summarize payoff trajectory and caveats
